mapper.select: SELECT round(avg(r.rating), 2) AS avgRating, count(r.rating) AS nbrReviews FROM ebock.review r WHERE r.reviewed_cip = #{cip} GROUP BY r.reviewed_cip
SELECT u.first_name, u.last_name, u.profile_picture_guid, r.content, r.timestamp_, r.rating FROM ebock.review r INNER JOIN ebock.user_ u ON r.reviewer_cip = u.cip WHERE r.reviewed_cip = #{cip}
